albania.name: Albania
albania.bestTime: From June to August, the seas remain calmest and waters clearest, with temperatures warming to 25–26°C.

algeria.name: Algeria
algeria.bestTime: June to September, the seas calm and the water clears, with a warm 26°C welcome.

austria.name: Austria
austria.description: Alpine lakes, crystal-clear freshwater diving, and mountain scenery.

belgium.name: Belgium
belgium.description: North Sea wrecks, lake diving, and a small but active dive community.

bulgaria.name: Bulgaria
bulgaria.bestTime: June to August offers the calmest seas and clearest water, with the warmest temperatures reaching 26°C.

croatia.name: Croatia
croatia.description: Wrecks, caves, and clear Adriatic waters along the Dalmatian coast.
croatia.bestTime: June to August presents the calmest seas, clear water, and dry months; temperatures warm up nicely to 25–26°C during this period.

cyprus.name: Cyprus
cyprus.description: Zenobia wreck and warm, clear waters. Includes Akrotiri and Dhekelia (UK Sovereign Base Areas).
cyprus.bestTime: June to September brings Cyprus its calmest seas and clearest water, with temperatures warming to 29–30°C.

denmark.name: Denmark
denmark.description: Baltic Sea wrecks and temperate diving.
denmark.bestTime: In July, Denmark's seas calm and water clears, with temperatures reaching a brisk 18–19°C.

finland.name: Finland
finland.description: Baltic Sea wrecks and lake diving in the north.
finland.bestTime: June offers the calmest seas, clearest water, and driest months, with temperatures warming up to 20°C during the peak of summer.

france.name: France
france.description: Atlantic and Mediterranean coasts, wrecks, kelp, and marine parks.
france.bestTime: Along the Mediterranean coast, June to August offers calm seas and clear water, with warm temperatures around 24–25°C. On the Atlantic coast, April to September brings the calmest seas, while French Polynesia invites year-round diving, particularly dry from July to October with 27–29°C waters.

germany.name: Germany
germany.description: Lakes, rivers, and Baltic Sea wrecks.
germany.bestTime: March to May and November are when Germany's waters calm and clarity peaks, offering a pleasant diving experience with temperatures ranging from brisk 14°C to mild 23°C.

greece.name: Greece
greece.description: Wrecks, caves, and blue Aegean waters from Crete to the Cyclades.
greece.bestTime: May to August's warm, calm seas and dry conditions invite divers, with water temperatures warming to 25–27°C.

iceland.name: Iceland
iceland.description: Silfra fissure, geothermal diving, and Arctic marine life.
iceland.bestTime: November to February sees the clearest water, with brisk temperatures ranging from 11°C to 15°C, offering an invigorating dive experience.

ireland.name: Ireland
ireland.description: Wrecks, reefs, and wild Atlantic diving.
ireland.bestTime: June to July offers the calmest seas and clearest waters, with mild temperatures between 15–16°C as the weather settles into drier months.

italy.name: Italy
italy.description: Stunning coastlines, caves, and rich history from Sardinia to Sicily.
italy.bestTime: The west coast enjoys calm seas from June to August, with waters warming to 27–28°C, while the east coast finds dry conditions and calm seas in May and July with water temperatures rising to 30–31°C.

sardinia.name: Sardinia
sardinia.description: Caves, wrecks, and crystal-clear Mediterranean waters.

sicily.name: Sicily
sicily.description: Volcanic islands, wrecks, and vibrant reefs.

malta.name: Malta
malta.description: Blue Hole, wrecks, and crystal-clear Mediterranean diving.
malta.bestTime: June to August brings the calmest seas and driest months, with water warming to a pleasant 27–28°C.

montenegro.name: Montenegro
montenegro.description: Adriatic coast diving, fjords, and clear waters.
montenegro.bestTime: June to August delivers the calmest seas, clearest water, and driest months, with water temperatures reaching a pleasant 26°C.

netherlands.name: Netherlands
netherlands.description: Zeeland estuaries and North Sea wrecks.
netherlands.bestTime: April sees the Atlantic coast calm with clear water and dry conditions, with temperatures around 12–22°C. On the Caribbean coast, January to April offers dry months, with 27°C waters.

norway.name: Norway
norway.description: Fjords, kelp forests, and cold-water wrecks.
norway.bestTime: On the Atlantic coast, dive from April to August when the seas calm; in the Arctic, the same months offer similar tranquility. Expect brisk waters, warming to 16–17°C in July and August.

poland.name: Poland
poland.description: Baltic Sea wrecks, lakes, and cold water diving.
poland.bestTime: April to August provides the calmest seas, with waters reaching a mild 19–20°C in summer.

portugal.name: Portugal
portugal.description: Azores, Madeira, and Atlantic coast diving.
portugal.bestTime: June to September delivers the calmest seas and driest weather, with water temperatures warming to 20–21°C.

azores.name: Azores
azores.bestTime: December to March offers the clearest water, with temperatures peaking at a mild 27°C.

romania.name: Romania
romania.description: Black Sea diving, wrecks, and unique marine life.

slovakia.name: Slovakia
slovakia.description: Freshwater lakes, caves, and mountain diving in Central Europe.

slovenia.name: Slovenia
slovenia.description: Short Adriatic coastline, caves, and freshwater diving.

spain.name: Spain
spain.description: Atlantic and Mediterranean coasts, Balearic and Canary Islands, marine reserves, and vibrant reefs.
spain.bestTime: In the Mediterranean coast, June to August offers the calmest seas and clearest water, with warm temperatures reaching 25–26°C. On the Atlantic coast, dive in June for similar calm and clear conditions, with sea temperatures around 17–18°C. Meanwhile, the Canary Islands see their driest months and clearest water from June to September, with comfortable waters at 19–23°C.

canary-islands.name: Canary Islands
canary-islands.bestTime: May to September is dry, with mild water around 21–23°C, though warmest August to October at 23–24°C.

sweden.name: Sweden
sweden.description: Wrecks, lakes, and cold-water marine life.
sweden.bestTime: February and April to May bring Sweden's calmest seas and clearest water, with temperatures at a brisk 5°C in cooler months and climbing to 19°C midsummer.

switzerland.name: Switzerland
switzerland.description: Alpine lakes, clear water, and unique freshwater diving in the heart of Europe.
switzerland.bestTime: From May to June and again August to September, Swiss lakes experience their calmest seas. Dive June–September if you seek the warmest water, reaching 20°C.

tunisia.name: Tunisia
tunisia.bestTime: From June to August, expect calmest seas, clearest water, and driest months, with water warming up to 27–28°C.

turkey.name: Turkey
turkey.description: Ancient ruins, wall dives, and warm Mediterranean seas.
turkey.bestTime: Calmest seas and driest months span June to September, with warm waters between 27–28°C.

united-kingdom.name: United Kingdom
united-kingdom.description: Wrecks, kelp forests, and seals from Scapa Flow to Cornwall.
united-kingdom.bestTime: May to July offers calmest seas, clearest water, and driest months, with temperatures at a mild 16°C.

northern-ireland-tuaisceart-eireann.name: Northern Ireland / Tuaisceart Eireann
northern-ireland-tuaisceart-eireann.description: Diving in Northern Ireland / Tuaisceart Eireann.

scotland.name: Scotland
scotland.bestTime: May to August brings the calmest seas to Scotland, with water temperatures rising to a brisk 12–13°C. Dive during these months for steadier conditions in the chilly waters.

europe-mediterranean.name: Europe & Mediterranean
europe-mediterranean.description: Historic wrecks, temperate waters, and Mediterranean classics
europe-mediterranean.bestTime: May–October for Mediterranean, June–September for Atlantic/temperate.

italian-riviera.name: Italian Riviera
italian-riviera.description: Portofino's marine park and Ligurian coast diving.

amalfi-coast.name: Amalfi Coast
amalfi-coast.description: Dramatic cliffs, grottos, and Mediterranean charm.

france-mediterranean.name: France (Mediterranean)
france-mediterranean.description: Wrecks, marine parks, and the Côte d'Azur.

spain-mediterranean.name: Spain (Mediterranean)
spain-mediterranean.description: Balearic Islands, marine reserves, and vibrant reefs.

gibraltar.name: Gibraltar
gibraltar.description: The gateway to the Mediterranean, famous for wrecks, caves, and unique marine life at the crossroads of the Atlantic and Mediterranean.
gibraltar.bestTime: October provides the calmest seas and clearest water in Gibraltar, with temperatures reaching a comfortable 21°C.

czechia.name: Czechia
czechia.description: Freshwater quarry and cave diving in the heart of Europe.

spain-atlantic.name: Spain (Atlantic)
spain-atlantic.description: Canary Islands and wild Atlantic reefs.

france-atlantic.name: France (Atlantic)
france-atlantic.description: Wrecks, kelp, and temperate Atlantic diving.

jersey.name: Jersey
jersey.description: Channel Island with temperate diving, kelp forests, and strong tides.
jersey.bestTime: From May to August, Jersey settles into its calmest and driest stretch, as the water temperature climbs to a mild 18–19°C.

russia.name: Russia
russia.bestTime: For the south, dive from June to August when seas are calmest, water is clearest, and rains ease. Expect warm dives at 26–27°C. In the north, conditions are diveable year-round but very cold.

estonia.name: Estonia
estonia.bestTime: From April to August, the seas calm for diving, while water temperatures range from a brisk 1°C to a milder 19°C at their peak during July and August.

latvia.name: Latvia
latvia.bestTime: April to August sees the calmest seas in Latvia, with water temperatures rising to a mild 19–20°C during July and August.

lithuania.name: Lithuania
lithuania.bestTime: April through August, Lithuania's seas calm down, and waters warm to a mild 19–20°C by July and August.

spittal-an-der-drau.name: Spittal An Der Drau
spittal-an-der-drau.description: Diving in Spittal An Der Drau.

lac-de-leau-dheure.name: Lac De L'eau D'heure
lac-de-leau-dheure.description: Diving in Lac De L'eau D'heure.

carriere-de-lille-sprimont.name: Carriere De Lille Sprimont
carriere-de-lille-sprimont.description: Diving in Carriere De Lille Sprimont.

st-nad-labem-region.name: Ústí Nad Labem Region
st-nad-labem-region.description: Diving in Ústí Nad Labem Region.
